Variables.Name: bUseTwoSidedLighting
Variables.Description: If true, this object will be lit as if it receives light from both sides of its polygons.

Variables.Name: bUseEmissiveForStaticLighting
Variables.Description: If true, allow using the emissive for static lighting.

Variables.Name: EmissiveLightExplicitInfluenceRadius
Variables.Description:
Direct lighting influence radius.
	  The default is 0, which means the influence radius should be automatically generated based on the emissive light brightness.
	  Values greater than 0 override the automatic method.

Variables.Name: bUseVertexNormalForHemisphereGather
Variables.Description:
Typically the triangle normal is used for hemisphere gathering which prevents incorrect self-shadowing from artist-tweaked vertex normals.
	  However in the case of foliage whose vertex normal has been setup to match the underlying terrain, gathering in the direction of the vertex normal is desired.

Variables.Name: EmissiveLightFalloffExponent
Variables.Description: Direct lighting falloff exponent for mesh area lights created from emissive areas on this primitive.

Variables.Name: bShadowIndirectOnly
Variables.Description: If true, this object will only shadow indirect lighting.

Variables.Name: EmissiveBoost
Variables.Description: Scales the emissive contribution of all materials applied to this object.

Variables.Name: DiffuseBoost
Variables.Description: Scales the diffuse contribution of all materials applied to this object.

Variables.Name: FullyOccludedSamplesFraction
Variables.Description: Fraction of samples taken that must be occluded in order to reach full occlusion.
